title: For Patients
subtitle: We're here to help. Find resources, schedule appointments, and get the answers you need.
quickAccessSubtitle: Manage your care with just a few clicks

quickAccessCards.title: Patient Portal
quickAccessCards.description: Access records, results, communicate with care team

beforeVisitItems: Arrive 10-15 minutes early to check in
Bring your insurance card and photo ID
Bring a list of current medications
Bring recent medical records if available
Complete patient paperwork online if possible
whatToExpectText:
Our clinical staff will conduct a brief evaluation, take vital signs, and review your medical history. Your physician will then spend time with you to discuss your symptoms, perform an exam, and develop a personalized care plan.

We're committed to providing compassionate, evidence-based care in a comfortable and professional environment.

patientResources.title: Online Scheduling
patientResources.description: Schedule your appointment at your convenience.

patientResources.title: Patient Portal - Epic MyChart
patientResources.description: Access your medical records, test results, and communicate with your care team.

patientResources.title: Online Bill Payment
patientResources.description: Pay your medical bills securely online.

patientResources.title: Patient Information & Paperwork
patientResources.description: Complete patient forms before your visit.

patientResources.title: Notice of Privacy Practices
patientResources.description: Review our HIPAA privacy practices and your patient rights.

insuranceBilling.title: Insurance Coverage
insuranceBilling.description: We accept most major insurance plans. Contact us to verify your coverage.

ctaText: Use our online scheduling system or call us today to book your appointment with one of our specialists.
